triage.explanation: Careful route required by hard triggers; factual or risky claims need evidence before PRD.

problem: Existing YOLO demand router schema readiness must block PRD readiness when any evidence agent reports missing evidence, clarify, block, or failed status.
status_quo: YOLO demand evidence dispatch exists in a dirty working tree and must be stress-tested with real Claude -p agents.
desired_outcome: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations become blockers and cannot produce prd_ready true.
scope_out: Do not intentionally modify target project files during evidence gathering.
constraints: Full tools may be available; harness boundary audit must detect any target-project mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations become blockers and cannot produce prd_ready true.
risks: A PRD could be generated from incomplete evidence if missing fields are ignored.

protocol.objective: Check whether gathered evidence is enough to support PRD readiness and acceptance criteria.
protocol.prompt: Verify that no assumption is presented as fact, evidence paths/sources are usable, and unresolved missing data is reflected as blockers or assumptions.

agent_results.claim: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations already become blockers and prevent prd_ready true in the existing YOLO demand router implementation.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function adds EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when missing.length > 0 and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blocker for clarify recommendations.
evidence.why: This is the core logic that converts missing evidence arrays and clarify recommendations into explicit blockers.

evidence.summary: Missing evidence check: if (missing.length > 0) issues.push({ code: "EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING", ... })
evidence.why: Direct implementation of missing evidence to blocker conversion.

evidence.summary: Clarify/block recommendation check: if (["clarify", "blocked", "block"].includes(recommendation)) issues.push({ code: recommendation === "clarify" ? "EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED" : "EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED", ... })
evidence.why: Direct implementation of clarify/block recommendation to blocker conversion.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each evidence agent result and pushes blockers into the list.
evidence.why: This integrates the blocking issues into the PRD readiness check.

evidence.summary: prd_ready is calculated as blockers.length === 0, meaning any blocker prevents readiness.
evidence.why: Final validation that blockers (including from missing/clarify) prevent prd_ready from being true.

evidence.summary: Test evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness passes with explicit verification.
evidence.why: Existing test coverage confirms the behavior is already implemented and working.

evidence.summary: Test assertions: assert.equal(readiness.prd_ready, false) and checks for EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blocker codes.
evidence.why: Test verifies that missing evidence and clarify recommendations correctly block PRD readiness.

risks: If this evidence is incorrect, a PRD could be generated from incomplete evidence without proper blocking.
The demand description may be outdated or may have been written before the implementation was completed.

result.notes: The functionality described in the demand (blocking PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing or clarify) is already fully implemented in src/demand/router.ts lines 481-510 and has test coverage. The demand may be asking to confirm existing behavior or may be outdated.

agent_results.claim: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations already become blockers and prevent prd_ready true in the existing YOLO demand router implementation. Cross-check confirms this is fully implemented and tested.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function independently verified: converts missing.length > 0 to EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker and clarify/blocked/block recommendations to EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED blockers.
evidence.why: Core logic that converts evidence agent results into explicit blockers.

evidence.summary: Missing evidence blocker confirmed: if (missing.length > 0) issues.push({ code: EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING, role, message })
evidence.why: Direct implementation of missing array to blocker conversion.

evidence.summary: Clarify/block recommendation blocker confirmed: if ([clarify, blocked, block].includes(recommendation)) converts to EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED.
evidence.why: Direct implementation of recommendation to blocker conversion.

evidence.summary: Integration confirmed: blockerList.push(...evidenceResultBlockingIssues(result)) adds all blocking issues to the final blocker list.
evidence.why: Connects the blocking logic into the PRD readiness pipeline.

evidence.summary: prd_ready calculation confirmed: const blockers = uniqueBlockers(blockerList) then prd_ready: blockers.length === 0.
evidence.why: Final validation that any blocker prevents PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Test case evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness independently verified with cross-checker missing array and clarify recommendation.
evidence.why: Test confirms both missing and clarify produce blockers that prevent prd_ready.

evidence.summary: Test assertions confirmed: assert.equal(readiness.prd_ready, false) and explicit checks for EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blocker codes.
evidence.why: Assertions verify the blocking behavior works as specified.

risks: The demand appears to be asking to confirm existing behavior rather than implement new functionality. If this demand was meant to implement a feature, it may already be complete.
If the demand intent was different (e.g. to modify the blocking behavior), the current evidence does not address that intent.

result.notes: Cross-check independently confirms all explorer claims. The functionality to convert missing evidence and clarify recommendations into blockers that prevent prd_ready is fully implemented in src/demand/router.ts and has test coverage. The demand asks for behavior that already exists.

agent_results.claim: Verification confirms that evidence missing and clarify recommendations already become blockers and prevent prd_ready true in the existing YOLO demand router implementation. All evidence paths are valid, no assumptions are presented as facts, and missing data is properly reflected.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function exists and implements the logic to convert missing arrays and clarify recommendations into blockers.
evidence.why: Primary source of truth for the blocking behavior implementation.

evidence.summary: Missing evidence check implementation confirmed with explicit code: if (missing.length > 0) issues.push({ code: EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING, ... })
evidence.why: Direct evidence that missing arrays produce blockers.

evidence.summary: Clarify/block recommendation check implementation confirmed: if ([clarify, blocked, block].includes(recommendation)) converts to appropriate blocker codes.
evidence.why: Direct evidence that clarify recommendations produce blockers.

evidence.summary: Integration point confirmed: blockerList.push(...evidenceResultBlockingIssues(result)) connects blocking logic to PRD readiness check.
evidence.why: Evidence that blocking issues are actually used in readiness calculation.

evidence.summary: prd_ready calculation confirmed: const blockers = uniqueBlockers(blockerList) then prd_ready: blockers.length === 0.
evidence.why: Final evidence that any blocker (including from missing/clarify) prevents prd_ready.

evidence.summary: Test case evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness exists and validates the behavior.
evidence.why: Test coverage evidence that the feature is working as specified.

evidence.summary: Test assertions confirm readiness.prd_ready is false and explicit blocker codes are checked.
evidence.why: Evidence that tests verify the blocking behavior comprehensively.

risks: The demand description may be asking to confirm existing behavior rather than implement new functionality. If this was intended as a feature implementation demand, it may already be complete.

The current demand status shows blockers for all three evidence agents (explorer, cross-checker, verifier) even though explorer and cross-checker have completed with results. This may indicate a state synchronization issue or that the demand router has not yet processed the agent results.

result.notes: Verification passes: all evidence paths are valid and exist in the codebase, no assumptions are presented as facts, and the claim is fully supported by project code and test evidence. Both explorer and cross-checker independently confirmed the same claim with high confidence and overlapping but independently-verified evidence records. The feature described in the demand (blocking PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing or clarify) is already implemented. However, the demand itself has prd_ready: false and shows EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED blockers for all three roles despite explorer and cross-checker having completed. Clarification is needed on whether this demand was meant to implement new behavior or confirm existing behavior, and whether the demand router has properly processed the agent results.
